headline: PrognoCIS Announces Strategic Collaboration with Global Payments to Launch PrognoPay
summary: PrognoCIS, a leading ambulatory Electronic Health Record (EHR) platform by Bizmatics, today announced the launch of PrognoPay, a modern payment solution embedded within PrognoCIS and powered by Global Payments, a global leader in payments technology. This strategic collaboration strengthens PrognoCIS' commitment to product excellence by unifying clinical, administrative, and financial workflows into a single, seamless experience for providers, practices, and patients.
